universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, currently active, with SMS opted-in and not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, as this is the highest weighted metric (conversion_rate at 0.6)
name: High-conversion: Open preventive care gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_id FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps WHERE LOWER(status) = 'open' AND LOWER(measure_category) IN ('preventive', 'chronic')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE a.address_id = m.address_id AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE mc.member_id = m.member_id AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%diabetes%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%hypertension%'))
rationale: This bucket targets members with open preventive care gaps, which are most likely to convert. The high conversion_rate weight (0.6) justifies treating this group separately. The message should emphasize the importance of preventive care and the benefits of staying on top of health screenings.
suggested_treatment: Highlight the importance of preventive care and offer to schedule an appointment for a health screening.
coverage_note: This set of buckets covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, currently active, with SMS opted-in and not suppressed. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, currently active, with SMS opted-in and not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, as this is the highest weighted metric (conversion_rate at 0.6)
name: Medium-conversion: Replied to prior SMS
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_id FROM marketing_ai.sms_events WHERE LOWER(event_type) = 'replied' AND event_timestamp > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE a.address_id = m.address_id AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE mc.member_id = m.member_id AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%diabetes%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%hypertension%'))
rationale: Members who have replied to prior SMS messages are more likely to engage with the campaign. The open_rate weight (0.25) justifies treating this group separately. The message should be concise and action-oriented, building on their prior engagement.
suggested_treatment: Offer to schedule an appointment for a preventive care visit, emphasizing the benefits of staying proactive with health management.
coverage_note: This set of buckets covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, currently active, with SMS opted-in and not suppressed. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

universe_definition: Members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, currently active, with SMS opted-in and not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open care gaps for preventive measures, as this is the highest weighted metric (conversion_rate at 0.6)
name: Low-conversion: Delivered but no interaction
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE m.member_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_id FROM marketing_ai.sms_events WHERE LOWER(event_type) = 'delivered' AND event_timestamp > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days') AND member_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_id FROM marketing_ai.sms_events WHERE LOWER(event_type) = 'replied' AND event_timestamp > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days'))) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE a.address_id = m.address_id AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE mc.member_id = m.member_id AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%diabetes%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%hypertension%'))
rationale: Members who have received SMS messages but have not interacted are less likely to convert. The open_rate weight (0.25) justifies treating this group separately. The message should be more persuasive and include a clear call-to-action.
suggested_treatment: Provide a reminder about the importance of preventive care and offer to schedule an appointment for a health screening.
coverage_note: This set of buckets covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, currently active, with SMS opted-in and not suppressed. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.

name: Low-conversion: No recent SMS engagement
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m WHERE m.member_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_id FROM marketing_ai.sms_events WHERE event_timestamp > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days')) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE) AND LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.addresses a WHERE a.address_id = m.address_id AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia')) AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '40 years') AND (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '25 years') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.member_conditions mc WHERE mc.member_id = m.member_id AND (LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%diabetes%' OR LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE '%hypertension%'))
rationale: Members with no recent SMS engagement are least likely to convert. The open_rate weight (0.25) justifies treating this group separately. The message should be more informative and include a clear call-to-action to schedule an appointment.
suggested_treatment: Provide educational content about the importance of preventive care and offer to schedule an appointment for a health screening.
coverage_note: This set of buckets covers the entire universe of members aged 25-40 in NE or IA with diabetes or hypertension, currently active, with SMS opted-in and not suppressed. No meaningful sub-population is intentionally excluded.
